---
title: "Diffusion Transformer"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.method-page}
# Pixel DiT

The DiT variant replaces the convolutional U-Net with token attention. A patch embedding turns the field into tokens,
then time and conditioning modulate transformer blocks, often with AdaLN-style conditioning:

$$
\mathbf{h}_{l+1}=\mathbf{h}_l+\mathrm{Attention}(\mathrm{AdaLN}(\mathbf{h}_l,t,c)).
$$

OceanLens `v8a_dit_pixel` tests whether global token interactions can better place residual energy in connected ocean
regions.

References: [DiT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2212.09748), [Stable Diffusion 3 / Rectified Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.03206).
:::
